          (ContinuousOn.integrableOn_compact (isCompact_closedBall 0 R) (by fun_prop))
      · intro x hx
        simp only [Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right] at hx
        have : x i * x j = (-x) i * (-x) j := by simp [neg_mul_neg]
        rw [← this]
        congr 1
        ext k
        simp [neg_eq_zero]
    simp [this]

ext i j
  simp only [inertiaTensor, solidSphere, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_eq_mul, Matrix.one_apply, mul_one]
  split_ifs with h
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (‖x‖^2 - x i * x i) ∂volume =
      (2/5) * (volume.real (Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R)) * R.1^2 := by
      apply Eq.symm
      rw [integral_norm_sq_sub_integral_mul_self]
      · field_simp [Space.volume_closedBall_neq_zero, hr]
        ring
      · exact isCompact_closedBall 0 R
    rw [this]
    field_simp [solidSphere_mass hr]
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (- x i * x j) ∂volume = 0 := by
      apply integral_neg_eq_self_of_odd_function
      · exact isCompact_closedBall 0 R
      · intro x hx
        simp only [Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right] at hx
        exact ⟨-x, by simpa using hx, by simp⟩
    rw [this]
    simp

linarith
    rw [h4]
    simp

simp only [Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right, norm_neg, hx]
        simp only [map_neg, neg_mul, neg_neg]
        exact ⟨h4, by simp [h, hx]⟩
    rw [h3]
    have h4 : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, ‖x‖^2 ∂volume =
        (4 * π / 5) * R.1 ^ 5 := by
      rw [integral_norm_sq_closedBall]
    rw [h4]
    have h5 : volume.real (Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R) = (4 * π / 3) * R.1 ^ 3 := by
      rw [Space.volume_closedBall_real]
    field_simp [h5]
    ring

ext i j
  simp only [inertiaTensor, solidSphere, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_eq_mul, one_div, Matrix.one_apply, eq_self_iff_true, ite_true]
  split_ifs with h
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (‖x‖^2 - x i * x i) ∂volume =
      (2/5) * (volume.real (Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R)) * R.1^2 := by
      rw [← integral_const_mul]
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      have hR : R.1 > 0 := lt_of_le_of_ne R.2 (Ne.symm hr)
      calc
        ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (‖x‖^2 - x i * x i) ∂volume
          = ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (x 0 ^ 2 + x 1 ^ 2 + x 2 ^ 2 - x i ^ 2) ∂volume := by
            congr 1; ext x; simp [norm_eq_sqrt, Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt hR]
        _ = (∑ k : Fin 3, if k = i then 0 else ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, x k ^ 2 ∂volume) := by
            simp [Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
        _ = 2 * ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, x 0 ^ 2 ∂volume := by
            have H : ∀ k : Fin 3, ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, x k ^ 2 ∂volume =
                ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, x 0 ^ 2 ∂volume := by
              intro k
              apply integral_congr_ae
              apply EventuallyEq.symm
              exact ae_restrict_of_ae (by
                apply MeasureTheory.Measure.ae_of_all
                intro x
                simp only [Pi.mul_apply, Pi.sub_apply, Pi.add_apply, Pi.zero_apply]
                rw [← sub_eq_zero]
                have h1 : ‖x‖^2 = x 0 ^ 2 + x 1 ^ 2 + x 2 ^ 2 := by
                  simp [norm_eq_sqrt, Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt hR]
                simp [h1])
            simp [H, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
        _ = (2/5) * (volume.real (Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R)) * R.1^2 := by
            have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, x 0 ^ 2 ∂volume =
                (1/5) * (volume.real (Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R)) * R.1^2 := by
              apply integral_x_pow_two_ball
            rw [this]; ring
    field_simp [this]
    ring
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (-x i * x j) ∂volume = 0 := by
      apply integral_odd_function_ball
      intro x
      simp only [Pi.neg_apply, mul_neg, neg_mul, neg_neg]
      have h1 : i ≠ j := by simpa using h
      have h2 : Function.Injective (fun k : Fin 3 => if k = i then -x k else x k) := by
        intro k l hk hl
        by_cases hk' : k = i <;> by_cases hl' : l = i <;> simp_all
      simp_all
    simp [this]

mul_one, sub_self, zero_mul, sub_zero, Pi.mul_apply, mul_comm]
  split_ifs with h
  · ring
  · ring

ext i j
  simp only [inertiaTensor, solidSphere, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_eq_mul, Matrix.one_apply, mul_one]
  split_ifs with h
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (x i)^2 ∂volume =
      (1/3 : ℝ) * ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, ‖x‖^2 ∂volume := by
      apply Eq.symm
      rw [← integral_sum_eq_sum_integral]
      simp only [Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero, add_zero, Nat.cast_zero, zero_add]
      congr 1
      ext k
      simp [sq]
    rw [this]
    field_simp [hr]
    ring
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, x i * x j ∂volume = 0 := by
      apply integral_eq_zero_of_odd_function
      · exact measurableSet_closedBall _ _
      · intro x hx
        simp only [Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right] at hx
        have : -x ∈ Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R := by
          simpa [dist_zero_right] using hx
        simp [this]
      · intro x
        simp [mul_comm]
    simp [this]

ext i j
  simp only [inertiaTensor, solidSphere, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_eq_mul, one_div, Matrix.one_apply, eq_self_iff_true, ite_true]
  split_ifs with h
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (‖x‖^2 - x i * x i) ∂volume =
      (2/5) * (volume.real (Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R)) * R.1^2 := by
      rw [integral_norm_sq_sub_mul_self_of_ball]
      <;> simp [hr]
    rw [this]
    field_simp [solidSphere_mass hr]
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (- x i * x j) ∂volume = 0 := by
      apply integral_mul_coord_ne_zero_of_ball
      <;> simp [h]
    rw [this]
    simp

ext i j
  simp only [inertiaTensor, solidSphere, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_eq_mul, Matrix.one_apply, mul_one]
  split_ifs with h
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (x i)^2 ∂volume =
      (1/3 : ℝ) * ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, ‖x‖^2 ∂volume := by
      apply Eq.symm
      rw [← integral_sum_eq_sum_integral]
      swap
      · exact fun k _ => ContinuousOn.pow continuousOn_fst (by norm_num)
      · exact isCompact_closedBall 0 R
      · exact MeasureTheory.SigmaFinite.restrict (by infer_instance)
      simp only [Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero, add_zero, Nat.cast_zero, zero_add]
      congr
      ext k
      simp only [Pi.one_apply, Pi.add_apply, Pi.zero_apply, Nat.cast_succ, Nat.cast_zero,
        add_zero, one_mul, pow_two]
      have : ∀ l : Fin 3, ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (x l)^2 ∂volume =
          ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, (x 0)^2 ∂volume := by
        intro l
        have : ∃ σ : Equiv.Perm (Fin 3), σ 0 = l := by
          apply Fin.exists_fin_succ_equiv
        cases' this with σ hσ
        rw [← hσ]
        rw [integral_comp_perm]
        · rfl
        · exact isCompact_closedBall 0 R
        · exact MeasureTheory.SigmaFinite.restrict (by infer_instance)
      simp_all only [mul_comm]
      ring
    rw [this]
    have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, ‖x‖^2 ∂volume =
      (4 * π / 5) * R.1^5 := by
      rw [integral_norm_sq_closedBall]
      simp [hr]
    rw [this]
    field_simp [hr]
    ring
  · have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, x i * x j ∂volume = 0 := by
      have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, x i * x j ∂volume =
        -∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R, x i * x j ∂volume := by
        rw [← integral_neg]
        apply integral_congr_ae
        filter_upwards
        intro x hx
        simp only [Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right] at hx
        simp only [neg_mul, neg_neg, Pi.neg_apply]
        have : ∃ σ : Equiv.Perm (Fin 3), σ i = i ∧ σ j = j ∧ (∀ k, σ k = k → k = i ∨ k = j) ∧
          (∃ k, σ k ≠ k) := by
          use Equiv.swap i j
          simp [h]
        cases' this with σ hσ
        have : x ∘ σ ∈ Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R ↔ x ∈ Metric.closedBall (0 : Space 3) R := by
          simp [Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right, Equiv.Perm.isometry_coe]
        simp_all
      linarith
    simp [this]
